description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its textured leatherette upper and elegant silver hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. Carry this with understated outfits and a tonal belt. Textured leatherette upper with a metallic brand badge on the front Buckle and rivet detailing on the sides Rivet and buckle on the front, below the handles Two handles Two main zippered compartments with a zippered pocket on the second compartment and a mobile pouch in the first Zippered pocket on the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
